test_cases.title: First memory call creates session file
test_cases.description: Call subagent with memory='test-session', verify session file created in main session dir
steps: Call subagent tool: agent='general-purpose', task='list files', memory='test-session'
Verify result contains memoryId='test-session' and memoryAction='create'
Verify *.mem-test-session.jsonl file exists in main session directory

test_cases.title: Subsequent memory call resumes session
test_cases.description: Call subagent again with same memory identifier, verify resume behavior
steps: Call subagent tool: agent='general-purpose', task='what did I do before', memory='test-session'
Verify result contains memoryId='test-session' and memoryAction='resume'
Verify subagent can recall previous conversation context

test_cases.title: No-memory call unchanged
test_cases.description: Call subagent without memory, verify existing behavior preserved
steps: Call subagent tool: agent='general-purpose', task='hello' (no memory param)
Verify normal completion, no session file created

test_cases.title: Memory parameter sanitization
test_cases.description: Special characters in memory param are sanitized in filename
steps: Call subagent tool: memory='my agent/task:refactor'
Verify session file contains 'my_agent_task_refactor' in name

test_cases.title: Memory rejected in background mode
test_cases.description: Memory param with background=true returns error
steps: Call subagent tool: memory='test', background=true
Verify error message says memory not supported in background mode

test_cases.title: Memory rejected in parallel mode
test_cases.description: Memory param with tasks array returns error
steps: Call subagent tool: memory='test', tasks=[{agent:'a', task:'...'}]
Verify error message says memory not supported in parallel mode

test_cases.title: Memory rejected in chain mode
test_cases.description: Memory param with chain array returns error
steps: Call subagent tool: memory='test', chain=[{agent:'a', task:'...'}]
Verify error message says memory not supported in chain mode

test_cases.title: Memory rejected for in-memory session
test_cases.description: Memory param fails when main session has no file
steps: Start Pi with --no-session (in-memory session)
Call subagent tool: memory='test'
Verify error message about requiring file-backed session

test_cases.title: TypeScript type check passes
test_cases.description: npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors
steps: Run: cd xyz-pi-extensions && npx tsc --noEmit
Verify: 0 errors

test_cases.title: ESLint passes with no new errors
test_cases.description: npm run lint passes with 0 new errors
steps: Run: cd xyz-pi-extensions && npm run lint
Verify: 0 new errors compared to baseline
